1890780.name: Szrot
1890780.description:
Szrot is a CaRPG set in the 1980s in a country that no longer exists - Yugoslavia.

[Szrot: Polish word for busted old car]

Belgrade, Yugoslavia, 1980s. You're a young driver armed with nothing but your dad’s old car and an appetite for speed. Navigate the brutalist utopian cityscape, immerse yourself in underground street racing and help friends in need.

For you and your peers, street racing isn't just a hobby—it's a lifestyle. In the blur of speed, you can pretend the world isn’t collapsing, pretend you still have time to figure out what comes next. Push your driving skills to the limit in an adrenaline-fueled pursuit of excitement and liberation.

🏁 High-Speed Street Battles

Race through the socialist utopia of Novi Beograd. Explore a hand-crafted level, challenge opponents on the fly, and push your machine to the limit in adrenaline-fueled evening duels.

🔧 Deep Customization

Swap parts, switch out the engine, experiment with builds, and create your dream szrot. Every upgrade changes both your performance and your identity.

🌆 A Vivid Late-80s Yugoslav Setting

Cruise through atmospheric districts inspired by real Belgrade streets. Blocks, huge towers, and industrial backroads create a world that’s equal parts nostalgic and electric.

🎮 An homage to PS1 era graphics

Inspired by classic PlayStation visuals, every street, car, and character is modelled and textured using the same techniques and methods as back in the hay-day.

📜 Main quests and side quests

Between races, you’ll meet and interact with many characters from all walks of life. From grandmas needing help with groceries to shady people looking to profit from worsening conditions. These quests will give you an insight into the everyday life of the citizens of Belgrade.
1890780.supported_languages:
英语, 波兰语, 塞尔维亚语*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语
*具有完全音频支持的语言

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
